text.title: Spring Boot Layered Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable concerns to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: thin @RestController: one service call per method; no @Transactional; no repo; @Valid on requests
extract into a separate bean; @Async with named executor; tune pool size
@Transactional on the write method; map to/from DTOs
Java record + Bean Validation on request fields; response record carries no logic

text.example: layer=controller → thin @RestController with @Valid CreateOrderRequest, calls OrdersService.create(req), returns ResponseEntity<OrderResponse>.
